name: WBC Gold medalist 2 years in a row 🥇🔥 Alfie flew over to Thailand under the guidance of @2brothersmuaythai_cio and wins his category once again. Last year in Italy & this year Bangkok Thailand 🇹🇭 Big thanks to both Karls and Joe 🙏❤️ Al
